<table border="1" cellpadding="2" cellspacing="0" width="400">
<tr>
<td>
<table border="0" cellpadding="2" cellspacing="0" width="100%">
<tr>
<th align="center" colspan="2" style="background:#EFAAAA;" width="25">  Notice
</th></tr>
<tr>
<td style="background:#EFAAAA;" width="20">
</td><td align="center"> This article is about a clan that has been tagged dead. Any info is to be considered purely of historical value. Feel free to correct any inaccuracies.
</td></tr></table>
</td></tr></table>

'''Ancient Warriors''' ('''(AW)''') (November 2004 - December 2004) was a strictly 100 % loading time playing clan made by Miniman. It has later merged with [[Millenium Warriors]] to form [[Ancient Millenium Warriors]].

== History ==
Miniman left BtBs because of clan's inactivity and together with ReddPuke they formed Ancient Warriors. In late December 2004 clan has merged with [[Millenium Warriors]] into [[Ancient Millenium Warriors]].

== Members ==
=== Leader ===
* Miniman

=== Normal members ===
* Loop
* ReddPuke

== Clan Wars ==
=== Won ===
(AW) vs [meh] (1:0)

=== Lost & Tied ===
Never played more.

== See also ==
* [[Ancient Millenium Warriors]]

== External links ==
* [http://www.thegaminguniverse.com/forums/showthread.php?t=18938 Ancient Warriors GU thread (renamed to AMW after merging with MW)]

[[Category:Clans]]
[[Category:Retired clans]]

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110721135456/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/Ancient_Warriors -->
